name: adainthelab--skulk-email
description: Email via DreamHost — read inbox, send email, search messages. Send works from any VPS (including DigitalOcean) by routing through DreamHost's Roundcube webmail over HTTPS, bypassing SMTP port blocks. Optionally read a shared Gmail inbox via IMAP. Use when: sending email, checking inbox, reading messages, or setting up email for an agent. Dependencies: python3, curl, jq (must be installed on the host). Credentials: DreamHost mailbox email+password stored at ~/.config/skulk-email/credentials.json (user must create this file manually before use; see Setup). No third-party services or API keys needed.
